source: DBCC PAGE(CompressionCoverage, 1, 392, 3) WITH TABLERESULTS on SS2022 (robert-lee-mssql-local-1779207800)

+0.notes: always 0x06 for PAGE-compressed pages with CI present

+3.notes: offset from CI start to dictionary section

notes: CI type byte is 0x06 and reserved uint16 is 0x0000. Observed on cmp_page table (SS2022 PAGE compression), 156-slot page. dict_offset varies by page dictionary size.
